# Equatorial Mount Model Design

**External Assistant / CAD Engineer** | May 2024 - June 2025

**TL;DR:** Assisted in high-precision 3D mechanical modeling of an astronomical equatorial mount, generating complete standardized part and assembly drawings to guide manufacturing.

## 🎯 Project Objectives
To design a structurally robust, precise-tracking astronomical equatorial mount model, producing standardized mechanical CAD drawings to ensure smooth prototyping and physical assembly.

## 💻 Tech Stack
SolidWorks, AutoCAD, 3D Mechanical Modeling, Engineering Drawing, Mechanical Parts Design, Assembly Design

## 🛠️ Core Contributions
* **High-Precision 3D Part Modeling:** Designed parametric 3D CAD models of key components, including the declination (DEC) axis, right ascension (RA) axis, worm-gear drive mechanism, counterweight shaft, and tripod base adapter.
* **Engineering Drawings Generation:** Generated standard-compliant 2D mechanical part drawings and cross-sectional assembly drawings. Specified tight dimensional tolerances, geometric tolerances (GD&T), and surface roughness requirements.
* **Motion Simulation & Interference Checking:** Conducted kinematics analysis and clearance verification using SolidWorks Motion to resolve potential collisions at extreme orientation limits. Optimized gear mesh alignments based on simulation results.

## 🏆 Key Results & Quantified Impact
* Successfully delivered a complete mechanical package consisting of over 30 custom parts, complete with technical specifications ready for CNC machining.
* Achieved 100% assembly rate on the first trial by eliminating mechanical interference through strict tolerance chain analysis.
* Received high praise for engineering precision in school competitions.
